title: Global X Zero Coupon Bond 2030 ETF declares $0.176 dividend
content:
* Global X Zero Coupon Bond 2030 ETF (ZCBA [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ZCBA]) declares a $0.176/share monthly dividend [https://www.globalxetfs.com/funds/ZCBA].
 	* 30-day SEC yield of 4.32%.
 	* Payable July 7; for shareholders of record July 1; ex-div July 1.
 	* See ZCBA Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ZCBA/dividends?source=news_bullet]
